consumerTone: plain English; educational running-fitness context only; no deterministic race, training, injury, recovery, VO2 max, or talent claims

genomeEvidence.observedValue: calibrated running performance score, training-response model, injury-risk model, recovery model, VO2 max model, race-time model, and ancestry applicability metadata unavailable in this fixture

inputManifest.source: synthetic derived fitness-trait evidence for rundna validation

missingInputPolicy: Report unavailable local running performance, endurance-response, carbohydrate, fluid, nutrition, running-efficiency, injury-risk, recovery, training-plan, VO2 max, race-time, sport-suitability, and calibrated models explicitly; use public sample rows only as observed output structure and do not infer local training plans, performance, injury risk, nutrition targets, supplement needs, medical clearance, or race expectations.

referenceResources.title: NHGRI overview of polygenic risk scores
RunDNA Endurance Performance Plan sample report

reportPurpose: Consumer RunDNA running-fitness context using derived ACTN3/ACE evidence plus observed Toolbox Genomics RunDNA sample-report output structure.
